caption: Table 131. Document revision history
rows: Updated Wake-up time from low-power modes, High-speed external clock generated from a crystal/ceramic resonator, and Section 7: Ordering information. Updated Figure 1: STM32H533xx block diagram, Figure 7: LQFP64 pinout, and Figure 20: VIL/VIH for all I/Os except BOOT0. Updated Table 2: STM32H533xx features and peripheral counts, Table 11: SPI features, Table 14: STM32H533xx pin/ball definition, Table 15: Alternate functions (AF0 to AF7), Table 16: Alternate functions (AF8 to AF15), Table 21: Maximum allowed clock frequencies, Table 50: Flash memory programming, Table 85: OCTOSPI characteristics in DTR mode (with DQS) / HyperBus, Table 90: 12-bit ADC characteristics, and Table 105: LPTIMx characteristics. Added Figure 25: Asynchronous multiplexed PSRAM/NOR write waveforms. Minor text edits across the whole document.

Updated: – Section 3.7: Boot modes (The name of application note AN2606 is updated to Introduction to system memory boot mode on STM32 MCUs) – Table 14: STM32H533xx pin/ball definition (M12 pin is added in UFBGA144 column.) – Section 5.3.2: VCAP external capacitor (The name of application note AN5711 is updated to STM32H5 Series hardware development). – Table 30: Typical and maximum current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from SRAM with cache 2-way (Values in the f (MHz) column are modified) HCLK – Section 5.3.14: I/O port characteristics (The name of application note AN4899 is updated to STM32 microcontroller GPIO hardware settings and low-power consumption.) Minor text edits throughout the document.
